meta.title: aiAdaptiv — Your Private Company Brain. Owned, Not Rented.
meta.description: A fully white-labeled, document-intelligence AI platform deployed inside your own secure EU cloud account (Koyeb). You own the infrastructure, keys, and data. GDPR & EU AI Act safe. Strictly 6 founding partners.

hero.badge: Strictly 6 Founding Design Partners This Quarter
hero.subhead: We deploy a fully white-labeled AI platform directly inside your own secure EU cloud account (Koyeb). You own the infrastructure, keys, and data. We do the heavy lifting.
hero.tagline: No more pasting sensitive client data into public tools.

problem.h2: Public AI is a Massive Liability
points: Fines up to 4% (GDPR) or 7% (EU AI Act) of turnover.
Your contracts and client data can train public models and leak to competitors.
Small teams can't keep up with infrastructure and updates.

solution.h2: We Deploy It. You Own It.

pillars.title: Secure Document Intelligence
pillars.body: Upload 200-page contracts or due diligence files. Safely extract risks, compare versions, and get summaries — with zero data leaks.

pillars.title: 100% White-Labeled
pillars.body: ai.yourfirm.com with your branding. A real internal asset.

pillars.title: Your Own Cloud Account
pillars.body: Deployed in your own Koyeb account. You control everything.

pillars.title: Zero Overhead
pillars.body: We handle model updates, security, and maintenance.

pricing.note: We are flexible with serious design partners — if your team has specific open-source model preferences or specialized workflow needs, we will tailor the deployment during setup.

howItWorks.intro: We make private AI simple by deploying everything inside your own cloud account.

steps.title: 1. You Create Your Account (or we create it for you)
steps.body: Sign up for Koyeb (EU region). You control billing.

steps.title: 2. We Build & Brand It
steps.body: We deploy Open WebUI + optimized models, apply your logo, and map ai.yourfirm.com.

steps.title: 3. You Get Full Access
steps.body: Your team logs in and starts using it.

howItWorks.timeline: Typical timeline: 3–7 business days from payment to live.

roadmap.label: Client Roadmap

days.label: Day 1–2
days.body: You create (or we create) the Koyeb account and grant access.

days.label: Day 3–5
days.body: We deploy, brand, and optimize the platform for your workflows.

days.label: Day 6–7
days.body: Handover training + your team goes live.

roadmap.result: A fully branded, secure private AI platform running inside your own environment in under a week.

howItWorks.outro: You own the account. You own the data. We do the technical work.

behindTheArchitecture.lead: Hi, I'm the founder of aiAdaptiv.
body: I built this because boutique firms need powerful AI for contracts and client work — but public tools create serious risks. I only work with 6 partners at a time so I can give each one dedicated attention.

items.q: Why deploy inside my own Koyeb account?
items.a: True ownership. You control the account, billing, and keys. If you ever stop working with us, the entire platform stays yours — no vendor lock-in.

items.q: Do you see our sensitive data?
items.a: No. All processing happens inside your secure environment. We never have access to your prompts or documents.

items.q: What are the Koyeb GPU costs?
items.a: You pay Koyeb directly. Typical range is €400–€800/month depending on usage. We help you choose and optimize the right size during setup.
Usually 3–7 business days from payment to live, once you complete the onboarding checklist.
Yes. The monthly maintenance is cancelable with 30 days notice. You keep the platform you own.

qualifier.yes: you work with sensitive legal, financial, or client documents daily.
qualifier.no: you just need a cheap general AI tool.

footer.disclaimer: Legal Disclaimer: aiAdaptiv provides custom configuration and maintenance services inside the Client's own cloud environment. The Client owns the account and is solely responsible for data inputs and regulatory compliance (GDPR / EU AI Act). Service provided "as-is". Liability limited to fees paid.

terms.metaDescription: The terms governing aiAdaptiv's setup and maintenance services: ownership, fees, data handling, cancellation, and liability.
terms.intro: These terms govern the services aiAdaptiv ("we", "us") provides to the client ("Client", "you"). By ordering the setup service or paying the monthly maintenance fee, you agree to these terms.

body: aiAdaptiv provides custom configuration and maintenance services inside the Client's own cloud environment. We deploy an open-source AI platform (Open WebUI plus selected open-source models) into the Client's own cloud account (Koyeb, EU region), white-label it under the Client's domain (e.g. ai.yourfirm.com), and provide ongoing maintenance: model updates, security patches, and support.
We are flexible with serious design partners — specific open-source model preferences or specialized workflow needs are tailored during setup.

The Client owns the cloud account, the infrastructure, the keys, and the data. The platform is deployed inside the Client's own account, and it remains the Client's if the engagement ends. There is no vendor lock-in: if you stop working with us, the entire platform stays yours.
One-time Setup & Deployment: €1,999, due before deployment begins.
Monthly Maintenance & Support: €249 per month, billed monthly.

Cloud infrastructure costs (e.g. Koyeb GPU usage, typically €400–€800 per month depending on usage) are paid by the Client directly to the cloud provider and are not part of our fees. We help choose and optimize the right instance size during setup.

All processing happens inside the Client's secure environment. We do not have access to the Client's prompts or documents in the running platform. Any access credentials granted to us for deployment or maintenance are used solely to provide the services and are treated as confidential.
The Client is solely responsible for data inputs and for regulatory compliance applicable to the Client's use of the platform, including GDPR and the EU AI Act.
The Client is responsible for the cloud account itself, including billing with the cloud provider, and for completing the onboarding checklist needed to go live.
Typical deployment takes 3–7 business days from payment to live, once the onboarding checklist is complete. Timelines are estimates, not guarantees.

The monthly maintenance service is cancelable by either party with 30 days' notice. After cancellation the Client keeps the platform, the account, and the data; ongoing updates and support end with the notice period.
The one-time setup fee is non-refundable once deployment has been completed.

The service is provided "as-is", without warranties of any kind, express or implied, including fitness for a particular purpose. AI model outputs are probabilistic; the Client is responsible for reviewing outputs before relying on them.

To the maximum extent permitted by law, our total aggregate liability arising out of or related to the services is limited to the fees the Client has paid to us. We are not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages, or for costs charged by third-party providers.

We may update these terms from time to time. The current version is always published on this page; material changes will be communicated to active clients. Continued use of the maintenance service after a change constitutes acceptance.
